query:
You are compiling the implementation brief for nan-003.
Your agent ID: nan-003-synthesizer

Read these artifacts:
- product/features/nan-003/SCOPE.md
- product/features/nan-003/SCOPE-RISK-ASSESSMENT.md
- product/features/nan-003/specification/SPECIFICATION.md
- product/features/nan-003/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md

- product/features/nan-003/RISK-TEST-STRATEGY.md

ADR file paths from architect:
- ADR-001-hard-stop-gates-seed-state-machine.md
- ADR-002-versioned-sentinel-idempotency.md
- ADR-003-context-status-preflight.md
- ADR-004-terminal-only-recommendation-output.md
- ADR-005-claude-md-block-unimatrix-skills-only.md
- ADR-006-seed-entry-categories-and-quality-gate.md

Vision variances from vision guardian:
- VARIANCE 1: PRODUCT-VISION.md describes nan-003 as full project init (schema, ONNX, npx), but actual scope is onboarding skills only. nan-004 handles the rest. Vision needs updating to reflect split. Recommendation: update PRODUCT-VISION.md.
- WARN 1: outcome category in FR-05(c) not in SCOPE.md/ARCHITECTURE.md category list
- WARN 2: Spec still lists ADR-002 sentinel fallback as open question (should absorb decision)
- WARN 3: >=3 entries threshold not locked in spec

Produce: IMPLEMENTATION-BRIEF.md, ACCEPTANCE-MAP.md, and create a GH Issue.

Write IMPLEMENTATION-BRIEF.md to product/features/nan-003/IMPLEMENTATION-BRIEF.md
Write ACCEPTANCE-MAP.md to product/features/nan-003/ACCEPTANCE-MAP.md

For the GH Issue, use: gh issue create --title "[nan-003] Unimatrix Onboarding Skills" --label "nanoprobes" --body "..."
The issue should summarize the feature, list ACs, and link to the design artifacts.

Return: file paths + GH Issue URL.
